item.description: Clinics and research in hepatology and gastroenterology - The management of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) in patients with cystic fibrosis (CF) at risk of respiratory failure and severe lung infection is poorly described. The objective of this study wa...

item.title: Endoscopic Ultrasound-Guided Drainage of an Intra-Abdominal Abscess in a Patient with Crohn's Disease.

item.description: Journal of medical economics - Multicenter study - Perianal fistulas are a common complication of Crohn's disease. Despite the current treatment options, fistula recurrence/treatment failure rates are high. The aim of this study was to assess healt...

item.description: ANZ journal of surgery - Endoscopic and radiologic changes following strictureplasty for Crohn's disease (CD) remain largely unknown. This study aimed to evaluate postoperative mucosal and transmural healing at stricturepl...

item.title: Beyond intestinal failure: Expanding therapeutic frontiers of glucagon-like peptide-2 in gastrointestinal disease.

item.title: Surgical interventions in inflammatory bowel disease: Indications, techniques, outcomes, and future directions.
item.description: World journal of gastrointestinal pharmacology and therapeutics - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), encompassing ulcerative colitis (UC) and Crohn's disease (CD), is a chronic relapsing condition in which surgical intervention remains a cornerstone of management ...

item.title: The role of lipid metabolism and creeping fat in disease assessment and prediction for Crohn's disease.
item.description: Frontiers in immunology - Review - Crohn's Disease (CD) is a chronic disease that often leads to disability. Effective monitoring of the disease is essential for delaying progression and improving outcomes. Traditional assessment me...
